name: Đàn bầu
fallbackDescription: a singing monochord lead with elastic pitch bends and glassy harmonics

name: Suona (restrained)
fallbackDescription: restrained suona, a piercing double-reed horn kept lyrical and controlled

name: Suona (bold)
fallbackDescription: bold suona, a bright penetrating double-reed horn leading the hook

name: Suona (maximum)
fallbackDescription: maximum-intensity suona, an explosive celebratory double-reed horn above the drop

name: Serunai
fallbackDescription: nasal ceremonial double-reed serunai with winding ornamentation

name: Gamelan
fallbackDescription: interlocking bronze metallophones with shimmering overtones

name: Phin
fallbackDescription: bright plucked Isan lute riffs with nimble folk phrasing

name: Khaen
fallbackDescription: breathy bamboo mouth-organ drones and pulsing chords

name: Guzheng
fallbackDescription: guzheng zither glissandi, bent strings and crisp plucked attacks

name: Erhu
fallbackDescription: erhu two-string bowed lead with expressive slides; unmistakably Chinese erhu timbre, not Western violin

name: Log drum
fallbackDescription: deep pitched log-drum rolls and elastic low-end knocks

name: Sitar
fallbackDescription: buzzing sitar lead with cascading meends and sympathetic resonance

fallbackDescription: articulate tabla bols and rolling hand-drum phrases
